Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0D90 "EGBERT-C000-0D90" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Egbert.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This game has a BASIC title screen loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Executes the RUN command to display the title screen and start the game program.
Notes: 1. The BASIC title screen has been modified to remove the loading of the machine code program from tape. This was achieved by copying the SYS 3472 ($0D90) statement from $0AC2 (8 bytes including the three null terminators) to $0A9A. 2. To dump, simply set a breakpoint on $0D90.
